name: 圓滿溫情型結尾（新生活的幸福定格）
name_en: Heartwarming Happy Ending (New Life Freeze Frame)
description: 在所有仇恨清算之後，以女主與真正的家人團聚的溫馨畫面結尾，讓觀眾在經歷了大量虐心和爽感之後，以溫暖的情緒離場。
tags: 最後幾秒，家人團聚畫面

examples.drama_title: 👑Abandoned by Family, She is Reborn as the Wife of a Billionaire, and They Beg for Her Forgiveness!
examples.excerpt: In this lifetime, I finally managed to change my own and my family's destiny and found my own happiness. ... Zantha. ... Mom. ... Zandy.
examples.context: 最後幾秒，家人團聚畫面
